summary: V10000.3 Omnis-Nexus & V10007.0 Omnis-Interconnect testing complete. All 18 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend Sovereign Hub displays V10007.0 header with Zen-Flow HUD mode, Gesture Mode Active toggle, Holographic overlay, and Gesture navigation guide with 4 modules (Law, Art, Engineering, Wellness). Gesture handler endpoint correctly maps all 4 gestures to their respective actions.
critical_code_review_comments: V10000.3 Nexus Status endpoint correctly returns nodal anchors (MASONRY_SCHOOL, BLACK_HILLS_PRIMARY) and tier access matrix
V10007.0 Interconnect Status endpoint returns mixer control with tier_level, holographic_opacity, and resonance_target
Singularity execution endpoint returns INTERCONNECTED - ALL SYSTEMS GREEN with law, art, rpg interconnects
Gesture handler correctly maps: circle->LAW, spiral->ART, triangle->LOGIC, heart->WELLNESS
Frontend displays V10007.0 • OMNIS-INTERCONNECT • ZEN-FLOW HUD header
Gesture Mode Active toggle is visible and functional
Holographic overlay SVG with Flower of Life pattern is present
Gesture navigation guide shows 4 modules with correct icons and gesture labels
Time usage tracking at $15/hr Knowledge Equity billing implemented
54-layer L² Fractal transparency at 88% default opacity working
context_for_next_testing_agent: V10000.3 Omnis-Nexus and V10007.0 Omnis-Interconnect fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/omnis/nexus/status, GET /api/omnis/interconnect/status, POST /api/omnis/interconnect/singularity, POST /api/omnis/interconnect/gesture?gesture={circle|spiral|triangle|heart}. Frontend Sovereign Hub shows Zen-Flow HUD with gesture navigation for Tier 2+ users. Buttons are hidden when Gesture Mode is active.
